adminFacilityAdd.doYouWantToAddPrograms: Do you want to add programs to ${facility}?
adminFacilityAdd.operationalDate.descrip: This is used in reporting to record the date the facility becomes operational
adminFacilityAdd.activeFacility.descript: This determines whether or not the facility can submit requisitions or receive deliveries

adminFacilityAdd.quantityUnitDisplay.des: Determines whether quantities are shown in packs, in doses, or with a toggle between both for this facility's users
